sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: AMETEK Inc. Stock: Robust Growth in Electronic Instruments and Electromechanical Segment Drives Long
feed.summary: AMETEK Inc. demonstrates strong operational performance through its focus on niche markets in electronic instruments and electromechanical systems, serving aerospace, medical, and industrial sectors. The company's dual-segment structure, comprising the Electronic Instruments Group (EIG) and Electromechanical Group (EMG), targets growth in high-margin, specialized markets and offers stability amid economic cycles. North American investors benefit from its NYSE listing, consistent dividend growth, and a blend of innovation, acquisition-driven expansion, and reliable cash flow generation, although valuation premium and supply chain risks warrant monitoring.

feed.title: Genmab initiated with an Outperform at Wolfe Research
feed.summary: Wolfe Research initiated coverage of Genmab (GMAB) with an Outperform rating and a $32 price target, despite the company facing a "critical" loss of exclusivity in 2029. The analyst believes Genmab's pipeline should fully replenish sales by 2031 and views the recent stock weakness as a "buy the dip" opportunity ahead of key clinical catalysts in 2026.

feed.title: Photronics, Micron, Western Digital, Himax, and Amkor Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Photronics, Micron, Western Digital, Himax, and Amkor plummeted following news of Google's new TurboQuant algorithm, which is expected to reduce memory requirements for AI models, causing a sector-wide sell-off due to anticipated decreased demand for memory chips. This news overshadowed recent strong earnings and added to competitive pressures from potential new market entrants like SK Hynix. Despite the drop, previous news of a $4 trillion investment consortium for semiconductor supply chains from the Trump administration had positively impacted Amkor's stock earlier.

feed.title: Veritone taps Oracle cloud for media archives, police evidence AI
feed.summary: Veritone has signed a multi-year agreement with Oracle to migrate its AI solutions, including its aiWARE platform, Veritone Data Refinery, and Veritone Data Marketplace, to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). This partnership aims to enhance the scalability, security, and performance of Veritone's AI offerings, supporting global growth and AI expansion across commercial (media, sports, entertainment, news) and public sectors. Veritone plans to leverage OCI's high-performance infrastructure and distributed cloud capabilities to meet data residency and security requirements, particularly for government and public sector applications like its Intelligent Digital Evidence Management System (iDEMS), which will be deployed in CJIS and FedRAMP-authorized environments.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Announces Retirement of Richard Carlson, Vice President of Global Food Safety and Quality Management
feed.summary: Richard Carlson, Vice President of Global Food Safety and Quality Management at Hormel Foods, is retiring after a 35-year career. Jeremiah Johnson, director of food safety management and a 20-year company veteran, will succeed Carlson in the role. This transition will be effective May 1, 2026.

feed.title: Granite gets $495M job to build 27 miles of roads, bridges and fencing
feed.summary: Granite (NYSE: GVA) has been awarded a $495 million contract by Customs and Border Protection for the LRT-4 Webb - Zapata project. This project involves constructing 27 miles of tactical infrastructure near Laredo, Texas, including mass excavation, grading, roads, fencing, cattle guards, seven bridges, eight major culvert crossings, and extensive electrical, lighting, camera, and fiberoptic installations. Work is scheduled to begin in April 2026 and conclude in July 2027, marking a significant addition to Granite's federal work portfolio.

feed.title: Teradyne Inc. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of Teradyne Inc. (TER) fell 8.05% on Thursday, closing at $297.34. This underperformance occurred during a broader market decline, with the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also ending lower. The drop broke a three-day winning streak for the stock.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser sets April 30 earnings release, May 1 webcast
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser (NYSE: WY) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 results on April 30, 2026, after the market closes. The company will also host a live webcast and conference call on May 1, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. PT (10:00 a.m. ET) to discuss these results. Investors can access the earnings release, webcast, and presentation in the Investors section of www.weyerhaeuser.com.

feed.title: Gartner’s AI Strategy Faces Consumer Skepticism as Survey Data Released
feed.summary: Gartner's stock has risen by 4.24% amidst market optimism, even as new survey data reveals significant consumer skepticism towards generative AI in brand content, with half of U.S. consumers preferring brands that avoid its use. Gartner, a leading advisor, is thus guiding marketers to deploy AI transparently and responsibly, leveraging resources like AskGartner and planned symposiums. The company's financial overview shows strong performance, including $6.49B revenue and a 68.4% gross margin, indicating a solid financial standing despite evolving consumer preferences regarding AI.

feed.title: Netflix prices are rising again, hitting nearly $27 a month
feed.summary: Netflix has announced its second price increase in just over a year, with the premium plan now costing $26.99 a month and the ad-supported standard plan rising to $8.99. These changes come as the company expands its content offerings to include podcasts, live events like MLB's opening game, and games, seeking to reinvest in entertainment and improve user experience. Despite a growing trend of price sensitivity among consumers who are increasingly opting for ad-supported tiers, Netflix's stock rose slightly following the announcement.

feed.title: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Preliminary Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
feed.summary: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ:GSBC) will release its first quarter preliminary earnings after market close on Wednesday, April 15, 2026. A conference call will follow on Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Central Time, accessible via their Investor Relations website. The company will also file its earnings as an exhibit to a Current Report on Form 8-K with the SEC.

feed.title: Southern Company Rose 9% Year to Date. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Southern Company (SO) stock has risen 9% year to date, driven by increased electricity demand from AI data centers, electrification, and population growth. A valuation model suggests the stock is modestly undervalued, with a target price of $116, implying a 22% upside. The company is expanding its renewable portfolio and making significant infrastructure investments, supported by stable regulated earnings.

feed.title: Global Ship Lease Chief Financial Officer Sold Shares Worth Over $903K
feed.summary: Global Ship Lease's Chief Financial Officer, Psaropoulos Anastasios, sold 23,173 Class A Common Shares on March 25, 2026, for a total of $903,844. The shares were sold at a weighted average price of $39.0042. Following this transaction, Psaropoulos Anastasios directly holds 500,160 Class A Common Shares.

feed.title: Sempra (NYSE: SRE) unit seeks higher FERC return in TO6 deal
feed.summary: Sempra's subsidiary, San Diego Gas & Electric Company (SDG&E), has filed an unopposed settlement offer with FERC for its TO6 transmission rate proceeding. This settlement proposes to increase SDG&E's authorized base return on equity from 10.10% to 10.28% and set a hypothetical capital structure of 54% equity. While subject to FERC approval, expected in late 2026, the terms would be retroactive to June 1, 2025, and Sempra anticipates the impact on its diluted EPS for 2026 and 2027 to remain within its existing guidance ranges.

feed.title: Walmart (NYSE: WMT) Form 144 shows McMillon sold 19,416 shares thrice
feed.summary: A recent Walmart (NYSE: WMT) Form 144 filing indicates that C. Douglas McMillon sold 19,416 shares of common stock on three separate occasions: December 26, 2025, January 22, 2026, and February 26, 2026. These sales generated total proceeds over $6.9 million. The filing also detailed equity grants to McMillon from 2022 that were reported as fully paid.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) targets $1.5B EBITDA boost and 75–80% cash returns by 2030
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser (WY) released an investor presentation detailing its long-term strategy to increase Adjusted EBITDA by $1.5 billion by 2030, based on a 2024 baseline. The company plans to achieve this through growth in its Timberlands, Strategic Land Solutions, and Wood Products segments, alongside enterprise-wide efficiency initiatives. Weyerhaeuser also aims to return 75-80% of its Adjusted Funds Available for Distribution to shareholders annually via dividends and share repurchases, while maintaining an investment-grade balance sheet and progressing towards a 2040 net-zero emissions goal.

feed.title: Coffee and soda maker Keurig Dr Pepper sets April 23 earnings call
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ: KDP) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Thursday, April 23, 2026. A conference call hosted by CEO Tim Cofer and CFO Anthony DiSilvestro will follow at 8:00 AM ET on the same day to discuss the results. Investors and media can access the call via dial-in numbers or a live audio webcast and replay available on the company's website.

feed.title: W. R. Berkley to post Q1 results after market close April 21
feed.summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The company will also host a quarterly conference call with analysts and investors on the same day at 5:00 p.m. eastern time to discuss the results. W. R. Berkley is an insurance holding company specializing in commercial lines and operates globally in property casualty insurance.

feed.title: W. R. Berkley Corporation to Announce First Quarter 2026 Earnings on April 21, 2026
feed.summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The company will also hold a conference call with analysts and investors on the same day at 5:00 p.m. eastern time to discuss the results. A live audio webcast and a replay will be available on the company's website.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] AXON ENTERPRISE, INC. Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed Amendment No. 12 to a Schedule 13G/A for Axon Enterprise Inc, reporting zero beneficial ownership (0 shares, 0%) of Axon common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where Vanguard's subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately. The filing clarifies that The Vanguard Group no longer has, or is deemed to have, beneficial ownership over these securities, with separate filings from its subsidiaries expected to detail redistributed holdings.

feed.title: Gorman acquires logging rights from Weyerhaeuser
feed.summary: Gorman Brothers, a West Kelowna lumber company, has acquired the right to harvest 682,000 cubic metres of timber from Weyerhaeuser in a $120-million deal. This acquisition adds to Gorman Group’s existing timber tenure, incorporating areas near Oliver, Merritt, and the Okanagan. The deal received significant community support, reflecting the economic importance of the forestry sector to various stakeholders.

feed.title: Global Ship Lease (NYSE: GSL) CFO sells 23,173 shares around $39
feed.summary: Global Ship Lease CFO Anastasios Psaropoulos sold 23,173 Class A common shares on March 25, 2026, at a weighted average price of $39.0042 per share. Following this open-market transaction, he directly owns 108,102 shares, in addition to significant unvested equity awards tied to future performance and continued service. The sale was disclosed in a Form 4 SEC filing, which also detailed his various other equity holdings and vesting schedules.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Completes €3.0 Billion and $2.55 Billion Notes Offerings to Fund JDE Peet's Deal
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) has completed private offerings of €3.0 billion in euro notes and $2.55 billion in USD notes to finance its pending acquisition of JDE Peet’s. The company also signed registration rights agreements to facilitate the exchange or resale of these privately placed notes, with maturities ranging from 2028 to 2056. These financial actions establish terms including rating-based coupon step-ups and redemption features.

feed.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: Robinhood, Payoneer, Micron, Limbach, and Bristol-Myers Squibb
feed.summary: This article highlights several stocks that experienced significant movement yesterday. Robinhood and Payoneer saw increases due to a share repurchase program and new analyst coverage, respectively. Micron declined after Google's announcement potentially impacting demand for memory chips, while Limbach and Bristol-Myers Squibb rose due to strategic shifts and expanded drug approvals.

feed.title: Archana Vemulapalli resigns from Paycom Software board effective March 31, 2026
feed.summary: Archana Vemulapalli has resigned from the Paycom Software (PAYC) Board and all associated committees, effective March 31, 2026. Her resignation is due to a decision to pursue other professional opportunities and is not a result of any disagreement with the company. Consequently, the size of the Board will be reduced from seven to six directors.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; AT&T (T) ownership reported as 0 shares
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares of AT&T Inc. common stock. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will now report their beneficial ownership separately as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing indicates a procedural shift in reporting rather than a change in underlying ownership economics.

feed.title: Vanguard Amends 13G for Best Buy (NYSE: BBY) — Reports 0% Holding
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amendment No. 12 to its Schedule 13G/A for Best Buy Co. Inc. (NYSE: BBY), reporting a 0% holding of common stock. This change is attributed to an internal realignment within Vanguard, leading certain subsidiaries to report their beneficial ownership separately in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. Despite the amendment, the filing notes that no other single entity has an interest exceeding 5% in the reported securities.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: AVB) Amendment shows 0 shares; subsidiaries to report
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed an amendment (Schedule 13G/A) for AvalonBay Communities Inc. (AVB), reporting zero beneficial ownership following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This administrative change means that Vanguard's subsidiaries and business divisions will now report their beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The amendment confirms that Vanguard Group itself no longer directly holds or is deemed to hold AVB shares.

feed.title: 1,562-share Form 144 sale by Morgan Stanley (NYSE: AIR) reported
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC Executive Financial Services has filed a Form 144 to sell 1,562 shares of AAR Corp (NYSE: AIR) common stock. These shares are restricted stock vesting under a registered plan, with a sale date reported as June 1, 2024. The filing, dated March 26, 2026, involves an administrative disclosure regarding the planned disposition of vested shares.

feed.title: Masco (NYSE: MAS) refinances $1B credit line extending maturity to 2031
feed.summary: Masco Corporation has refinanced its $1 billion revolving credit facility, replacing its 2022 agreement and extending the maturity date to March 20, 2031, with options for further extensions. This new unsecured agreement, available to Masco and Masco Europe S.à r.l. in multiple currencies, will be used for general corporate purposes, including acquisitions and working capital, while adhering to financial covenants on leverage and interest coverage. The initial borrowings under the new facility were used to repay outstanding amounts from the previous credit line.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] BAXTER INTERNATIONAL INC Amended Passive Investment Disclosure | BAX SEC Filing - Form SCHEDULE 13G/A
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 11 to a Schedule 13G/A for Baxter International Inc. (BAX), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% ownership after an internal realignment. This change is due to certain Vanguard subsidiaries now reporting their ownership separately in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that this amendment reflects an administrative disaggregation rather than an economic sale or trading activity.

feed.title: Vanguard (BALL) disaggregates holdings, reports zero ownership in Ball Corp
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amendment No. 15 to Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership of Ball Corp (BALL) common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, under SEC Release No. 34-39538, which mandates certain Vanguard subsidiaries or business divisions to report their holdings separately. The filing confirms zero beneficial ownership and 0% of the class for The Vanguard Group itself, with any material ownership to be reported in separate filings by the disaggregated subsidiaries.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; AutoZone (NYSE: AZO) shows zero
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amendment No. 12 to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting that it now beneficially owns 0 shares of AutoZone common stock (NYSE: AZO). This change is due to an internal realignment within Vanguard and disaggregated reporting, as explained in SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that this amendment represents a reporting change rather than a sale of shares, with Vanguard's subsidiaries now reporting separately.

feed.title: Vanguard realignment: subsidiaries report Assurant holdings (AIZ)
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0% beneficial ownership of Assurant (AIZ) common stock, effective January 12, 2026. This change is due to an internal realignment where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, as permitted by SEC Release No. 34-39538. The amendment, signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, indicates an administrative shift in reporting responsibilities rather than a change in the total ownership of Assurant shares.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings, reports 0% in Bio‑Techne (NASDAQ: TECH)

This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, which led certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report their holdings separately. The filing clarifies that this is a reporting adjustment due to organizational structure, not an indication of a market sale of Bio-Techne shares.

feed.title: GeoPark (NYSE: GPRK) awards PSUs and RSUs to Chief People Officer
feed.summary: GeoPark (NYSE: GPRK) has awarded its Chief People Officer, Wisky Agustina Susana, 54,209 Performance Stock Units (PSUs) and 12,047 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as part of her compensation. These equity grants did not involve open-market trades and were assigned a $0.00 per share price. Following these awards, Ms. Susana directly holds 70,314 common shares and 124,922 performance or restricted units, with vesting contingent on employment and performance thresholds.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 shares in Biogen (NASDAQ: BIIB)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 13 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero shares and 0% beneficial ownership of Biogen common stock (NASDAQ: BIIB). This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries began reporting their holdings separately under SEC Release No. 34-39538. Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, signed the report.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 0 shares in Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE: BK) — Schedule 13G/A

This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, which led to certain Vanguard subsidiaries reporting their ownership separately. The filing, signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, emphasizes that this is an administrative reporting change rather than an active market trade.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: V) reports 0 ATO shares after internal realignment

This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies a reporting structure adjustment rather than indicating a sale or change in investment strategy.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: ADP) disaggregates holdings; reports 0 ADP shares

This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their beneficial ownership separately in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing indicates a change in reporting structure rather than a sale or purchase of ADP shares.

feed.title: Two to leave ONEOK’s Board of Directors
feed.summary: ONEOK announced that two of its board of directors members, Gerald B. Smith and Pattye L. Moore, will retire in May 2026 at the end of their current terms. Gerald B. Smith is retiring in accordance with the company's mandatory retirement age policy, while Pattye L. Moore has elected to retire. Both individuals were praised by ONEOK leadership for their long-standing commitment and significant contributions to the company's growth and success.

feed.title: Netflix raises subscription prices across all tiers
feed.summary: Netflix has increased its subscription prices across all tiers. The standard plan with ads rose by $1 to $8.99/month, the standard ad-free plan increased by $2 to $19.99/month, and the premium plan went up by $2 to $26.99/month. This adjustment affects all users of the streaming service.

feed.title: GeoPark (NYSE: GPRK) awards RSUs and PSUs to exploration chief
feed.summary: GeoPark (NYSE: GPRK) has granted equity awards to its Chief Exploration & Development Officer, Rodrigo Andres Dalle Fiore. He received 57,062 Performance Stock Units (PSUs), which can vest into common shares based on total shareholder return targets, and 12,681 common shares as a direct grant. Including these new awards, Dalle Fiore now holds a total of 48,396 direct common shares, which comprise 39,034 restricted stock units (RSUs) whose vesting is contingent on his continued employment.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 AVY shares (AVY)
feed.summary: Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares beneficially owned of Avery Dennison Corp common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538. Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, signed the filing, indicating that Vanguard Group, Inc. no longer has beneficial ownership over these disaggregated securities.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] Autod...
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK), reporting 0 shares of Common Stock as of March 13, 2026. This amendment reflects an internal realignment initiated on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately. The change is an administrative reallocation of reporting responsibility, not a disposition of shares, and does not alter Autodesk's outstanding shares.

feed.title: [Form 4] GeoPark Ltd Insider Trading Activity | GPRK Insider Trading
feed.summary: GeoPark Ltd's Chief Operating Officer, Rodolfo Martin Terrado, received equity-based compensation including 68,475 performance stock units and 15,217 common shares through a grant. His direct holdings now total 183,756 common shares, which include 24,745 restricted stock units. The vesting of these units is contingent upon his continued employment and achievement of absolute total shareholder return thresholds.

feed.title: [Form 4] GeoPark Ltd Insider Trading Activity | GPRK Insider Trading
feed.summary: GeoPark Ltd's Chief Financial Officer, Jaime Eduardo Caballero-Uribe, reported an acquisition of 65,622 Performance Stock Units and 14,583 common shares as restricted stock units on March 24, 2026. These equity awards are tied to future vesting based on total shareholder return thresholds and continued employment. Following these transactions, his direct holdings increased to 141,539 Performance Stock Units and 66,454 common shares.

feed.title: Director Alan Armstrong exits Constellation Energy (NASDAQ: CEG) board
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (NASDAQ: CEG) announced that director Alan Armstrong resigned from its Board of Directors, with the resignation effective March 23, 2026. This material event was reported via an 8-K filing, which stated no related financial items or other corporate actions were described. The filing outlined the company's registration details and confirmed Armstrong's departure under Section 5, Item 5.02(b) of the SEC report.

feed.title: [8-K] Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc., through its subsidiary Maple Parent Holdings Corp., has completed private offerings of €3.0 billion Euro Notes and $2.55 billion USD Notes to fund the acquisition of JDE Peet’s N.V. These senior unsecured notes carry fixed coupons ranging from 3.495% to 6.625% and mature between 2028 and 2056. The financing structure includes protective measures for investors, such as an interest rate step-up clause based on credit rating downgrades and a special mandatory redemption condition if the acquisition is not finalized by February 24, 2027.

feed.title: Teradyne, Applied Materials, Intel, KLA Corporation, and Semtech Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of several semiconductor companies, including Teradyne, Applied Materials, Intel, KLA Corporation, and Semtech, plummeted after Google announced its new TurboQuant algorithm, which threatens to reduce memory requirements for AI models. This news sparked a sector-wide sell-off due to concerns over decreased demand for memory chips, overshadowing recent strong earnings. Adding to the pressure are reports of SK Hynix considering a $14 billion U.S. listing, which would increase competitive supply in the market.
